name: Blades
description: Weapon training for swords and similar bladed weapons.

name: Axes
description: Weapon training for hand axes, battle axes, and similar weapons.

name: Shields
description: Training with shield use and defensive fighting.

name: Stealth
description: Training in hiding, moving quietly, and ambush.

name: Locks
description: Training in opening locks and handling simple mechanisms.

name: Lore
description: Training in history, monsters, magic, traps, ruins, and old knowledge.

name: Healing
description: Training in treating wounds and caring for the injured.

name: Survival
description: Training in travel, tracking, and harsh conditions.

name: Persuasion
description: Training in social influence, bargaining, and charm.

name: Sorcery
description: Training in casting spells from grimoires and hidden signs.

name: Faith
description: Training in sacred rites, vows, courage, and spiritual force.

name: Crafting
description: Training in making, repairing, and understanding worked objects.
